prompt: For a protein engineering research program, construct variants of Decaprenylphosphoryl-beta-D-ribose 2-oxidase (DprE1) (bacterial flavoenzyme (cell wall biosynthesis)) from Mycobacterium tuberculosis with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. detail a computational workflow covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using RoseTTAFold, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Please include key design considerations and expected challenges.
